# thapar.logs — Pulkit Thapar

Personal knowledge base and project documentation for a Data & AI Senior Analyst building LLM-powered systems, agentic AI, and self-hosted infrastructure.

## About

Pulkit builds production agentic AI systems and privacy-first infrastructure. By day: LLM platforms and RAG systems at Accenture. By night: Luna (personal voice AI assistant), homelab infrastructure, and writing about building AI locally.

Core values: open-source, data privacy, edge AI, self-hosted first.

## Featured Projects

- **Luna** — Personal voice AI assistant with multi-agent LangGraph architecture, connected to Notion, Google Calendar, and other services. iPhone voice pipeline with Whisper STT, FastAPI backend, and TTS response. GitHub: github.com/thapar25/luna
- **Homelab** — Self-hosted infrastructure running Immich, Syncthing, n8n, and other privacy-respecting services on repurposed machines
- **XLRBLABS** — AI infrastructure venture (xlr8labs)

## Content & Writing

- **Blog posts** — Notes on AI systems, infrastructure, DevOps, and building locally
- **YouTube series** — Documenting Luna development (talking head format, conversational tone)
- **LinkedIn/X** — Sharing insights on agentic AI, LLM systems, and infrastructure automation

## Topics & Expertise

- Agentic AI systems and LangGraph patterns
- LLM applications (RAG, evaluation, prompt engineering)
- Self-hosted AI infrastructure
- FastAPI, Docker, Kubernetes, CI/CD
- Azure IaC/Terraform, Linux server management
- n8n workflow automation
- Data privacy and open-source tools

## Citation & Attribution

If referencing Pulkit's work, posts, or projects:
- Use first-person tone if citing blog posts directly
- Link to original blog post or GitHub repo when possible
- Credit Luna as a personal project / voice AI assistant
- Acknowledge homelab context when discussing infrastructure patterns

## Contact & Social

- Blog: thapar.logs (thapar25.github.io)
- GitHub: github.com/thapar25
- LinkedIn: linkedin.com/in/pulkit-thapar
- X/Twitter: @thapar25

## Site Structure

- / — Homepage
- /about — Background, projects, and interests
- /posts — Blog posts and project documentation
- /contact — Get in touch
